name: Hanukkah Frying Pan Cookies (Soofganyot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 1 cup sugar in a bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add lemon peel and salt to the mixture.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together flour and baking powder.
5. Fold the dry ingredients into the butter mixture to make dough.
6. Heat enough oil for frying in a deep frying pan until it reaches 360°F (175°C).
7. Shape the dough into small balls.
8. Drop about 8 balls at a time into the hot oil.
9. Fry for 3 minutes, then turn with a slotted spoon and let fry until golden brown for an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
10. Lift the cookies out of the oil using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Combine the remaining 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon.
12. While the cookies are still warm, sprinkle them with the sugar and cinnamon mixture.
